profile.headlineEs: Software Engineer · IBM i/AS400 · Spring Boot · tooling IA/Codex · open source
profile.headlineEn: Software Engineer · IBM i/AS400 · Spring Boot · AI/Codex tooling · open source
profile.bioEs: Hola, soy Chris. Construyo herramientas open source alrededor de IBM i/AS400, backends Java/Spring Boot y automatización con IA para desarrollo real.
profile.bioEn: Hi, I am Chris. I build open-source tools around IBM i/AS400, Java/Spring Boot backends and AI-assisted automation for real development workflows.

focusAreas.detailsEs: RPGLE, CLLE, DDS, Db2 for i, RDi/Eclipse y modernización progresiva.
focusAreas.detailsEn: RPGLE, CLLE, DDS, Db2 for i, RDi/Eclipse and progressive modernization.

focusAreas.detailsEs: Java, Spring Boot, REST, integración con servicios y automatización de flujos técnicos.
focusAreas.detailsEn: Java, Spring Boot, REST, service integration and technical workflow automation.

focusAreas.detailsEs: MCPs, plugins para Codex/RDi, migradores de configuración y validaciones reproducibles.
focusAreas.detailsEn: MCPs, Codex/RDi plugins, configuration migrators and reproducible validations.

focusAreas.detailsEs: Análisis de vulnerabilidades, OCR para información sensible, CVE scoring y automatización defensiva.
focusAreas.detailsEn: Vulnerability analysis, sensitive-data OCR, CVE scoring and defensive automation.

featuredRepositories.name: MCP-IBMiDocs
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: MCP comunitario para consultar documentación IBM i/AS400 desde corpus local.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: Community MCP for IBM i/AS400 documentation from a local corpus.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Reduce alucinaciones técnicas al contrastar comandos, mensajes y lenguajes IBM i contra documentación versionada.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Reduces technical hallucinations by grounding IBM i commands, messages and languages in versioned documentation.

featuredRepositories.name: Plugin-Codex-para-RDi
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: Integración Codex para IBM RDi/Eclipse con contexto de editores, RSE y fuentes remotas.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: Codex integration for IBM RDi/Eclipse with editor, RSE and remote source context.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Acerca agentes de IA a flujos reales de mantenimiento IBM i sin romper el control del desarrollador.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Brings AI agents closer to real IBM i maintenance workflows while preserving developer control.

featuredRepositories.name: as400-mcp
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: Servidor MCP read-only para bibliotecas, tablas, fuentes y metadatos AS400/IBM i vía ODBC.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: Read-only MCP server for AS400/IBM i libraries, tables, source members and metadata via ODBC.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Permite inspección segura de entornos IBM i desde asistentes y herramientas modernas.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Enables safe IBM i environment inspection from assistants and modern tools.

featuredRepositories.name: Codex-Migration-tool
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: Migrador Windows para configuración global de Codex App, MCPs y secretos cifrados.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: Windows migrator for Codex App global config, MCPs and encrypted secrets.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Hace repetibles las mudanzas de entornos Codex sin perder servidores MCP ni configuración crítica.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Makes Codex environment moves repeatable without losing MCP servers or critical configuration.

featuredRepositories.name: detector-informacion-sensible-azure-ocr
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: API Java/Spring para detectar información sensible en imágenes usando Azure OCR.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: Java/Spring API to detect sensitive information in images using Azure OCR.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Convierte OCR en una validación defensiva accionable para datos sensibles.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Turns OCR into actionable defensive validation for sensitive data.

featuredRepositories.name: CVE-Exploitability-Prediction-with-Logistic-Regression
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: API y pipeline para gestión y predicción de explotabilidad de vulnerabilidades CVE.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: API and pipeline for CVE vulnerability management and exploitability prediction.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Une análisis de vulnerabilidades, datos y servicios backend para priorización técnica.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Connects vulnerability analysis, data and backend services for technical prioritization.

featuredRepositories.name: web-client-C
featuredRepositories.taglineEs: Biblioteca REST en C enfocada en autorización de transacciones y concurrencia HTTP.
featuredRepositories.taglineEn: REST client library in C focused on transaction authorization and HTTP concurrency.
featuredRepositories.impactEs: Demuestra bajo nivel, networking y diseño de librerías con foco en performance.
featuredRepositories.impactEn: Shows low-level networking and library design with a performance mindset.
